articles.name: OpenAI News
articles.title: OpenAI acquires TBPN
articles.summary: OpenAI acquires TBPN to accelerate global conversations around AI and support independent media, expanding dialogue with builders, businesses, and the broader tech community.

articles.name: OpenAI News
articles.title: Codex now offers more flexible pricing for teams
articles.summary: Codex now includes pay-as-you-go pricing for ChatGPT Business and Enterprise, providing teams a more flexible option to start and scale adoption.

articles.name: OpenAI News
articles.title: Gradient Labs gives every bank customer an AI account manager
articles.summary: Gradient Labs uses GPT-4.1 and GPT-5.4 mini and nano to power AI agents that automate banking support workflows with low latency and high reliability.

articles.name: OpenAI News
articles.title: Accelerating the next phase of AI
articles.summary: OpenAI raises $122 billion in new funding to expand frontier AI globally, invest in next-generation compute, and meet growing demand for ChatGPT, Codex, and enterprise AI.

articles.name: Anthropic Newsroom
articles.title: Introducing Sonnet 4.6 \ Anthropic
articles.summary: Claude Sonnet 4.6 is a full upgrade of the model’s skills across coding, computer use, long-reasoning, agent planning, knowledge work, and design.
articles.content: Claude Sonnet 4.6 is a full upgrade of the model’s skills across coding, computer use, long-reasoning, agent planning, knowledge work, and design.

articles.name: Anthropic Newsroom
articles.title: Claude Opus 4.6 \ Anthropic
articles.summary: We’re upgrading our smartest model. Across agentic coding, computer use, tool use, search, and finance, Opus 4.6 is an industry-leading model, often by wide margin.
articles.content: We’re upgrading our smartest model. Across agentic coding, computer use, tool use, search, and finance, Opus 4.6 is an industry-leading model, often by wide margin.

articles.name: Anthropic Newsroom
articles.title: Claude is a space to think | Anthropic \ Anthropic
articles.summary: We’ve made a choice: Claude will remain ad-free. We explain why advertising incentives are incompatible with a genuinely helpful AI assistant, and how we plan to expand access without compromising user trust.
articles.content: We’ve made a choice: Claude will remain ad-free. We explain why advertising incentives are incompatible with a genuinely helpful AI assistant, and how we plan to expand access without compromising user trust.

articles.name: Anthropic Newsroom
articles.title: Australian government and Anthropic sign MOU for AI safety and research \ Anthropic
articles.summary: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.
articles.content: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.
